params.condition: the strike was made with a melee weapon

effects.text: If the strike was made with a melee weapon, that weapon is destroyed.

params.effect: he or she takes an equal amount of damage during strike resolution as well
params.condition: the opposing minion inflicts damage with a hand strike this round (even if the damage is prevented)

effects.text: If the opposing minion inflicts damage with a hand strike this round (even if the damage is prevented), he or she takes an equal amount of damage during strike resolution as well.
